b1_correction.ruling: HITL ◆ B-1 Option 1 (2026-06-08): correct eu7 to measure ANN-quantization FIDELITY on the pre-fusion vector stage in isolation, then assert the unchanged 0.90 floor. A correction, NOT a weakening.
b1_correction.engine_seam: Engine::set_vector_stage_only_for_test (AtomicBool ProjectionRuntimeShared::vector_stage_only_for_test, off by default) → read_search_in_tx returns the pre-fusion vector_results instead of fuse_rrf(...). Mirrors set_recency_reweight_enabled_for_test (release-available).
b1_correction.harness_repoint: eu7_real_corpus_ac.rs::measure_recall: verdict SUT = vector-stage ranking (seam ON); report-only delta SUT = RRF-fused search() (seam OFF); same exclude-before+dedup method, same exact-f32 vector top-10 GT. Assert recall@10 >= 0.90 on all-real N.
b1_correction.seam_unit_test: tests/ga2_vector_stage_seam.rs — seam OFF returns fused (text-only FTS hit present); seam ON returns vector branch only (text-only hit absent, every hit branch=Vector); OFF again restores byte-identical fused output. PASSES in this worktree.

eu7_recall_verdict.sut: ANN+ vector stage (1-bit sign-quant K=192 Hamming + f32 rerank), pre-fusion
eu7_recall_verdict.ground_truth: exact-f32 VECTOR top-10 of the same bge-small model (in-Rust brute force)
eu7_recall_verdict.measurement_provenance: ON-RECORD anchor (dev/plans/runs/0.7.1-EU-7-measurements.json r_canonical_anchor, measured pre-unconditional-RRF i.e. effectively vector-stage). NOT re-measured in this worktree — see verification_posture.
eu7_recall_verdict.complementarity: ANN-quantization FIDELITY axis (system health); complementary to and NOT a substitute for the IR/relevance axis (eu8 ceiling ~0.571; IR-1 ir-recall-measure.md).

fused_vs_vector_delta.interpretation: The fused-search()@10 (~0.871) would RED the 0.90 assert; the vector-stage (~0.937) PASSES. The delta is intended RRF fusion divergence (vector ⊕ FTS5 vs a vector-only GT), NOT quantization-fidelity loss — proving the SUT repoint is load-bearing, not cosmetic. fused 0.8710 = prior slice-40 output.json; vector-stage 0.937 = the 0.7.1 anchor (pre-unconditional-RRF). GA-1 proved the corpus was byte-identical across both.
